title: gitmap-v28 list-releases --all-repos --json output
description: Array of Release rows joined with their owning Repo, returned by `gitmap-v28 list-releases --all-repos --json` (alias `gitmap-v28 lr --all-repos --json`). Ordered by createdAt DESC, exercising the IdxRelease_RepoId index added in v17. PascalCase keys are intentional: store.ReleaseAcrossRepos has no `json:` tags, so the legacy json.MarshalIndent surface used Go field names verbatim. Pinning that exact surface here prevents a silent rename when migrating off MarshalIndent. Empty result is `[]` (NOT `null`). Backed by gitmap-v28/stablejson — pinned by gitmap-v28/cmd/listreleases_jsonschema_contract_test.go.

items.title: Release joined with owning Repo
items.description: A single Release row with its owning Repo's slug + absolute path joined in.

ReleaseID.description: SQLite primary key of the Release row.

RepoID.description: Foreign key to the Repo table (v17+ schema).

RepoSlug.description: Owning repo's slug (e.g. `owner/name`). The join key downstream consumers use to group releases per repo.

RepoPath.description: Absolute filesystem path of the owning repo on the host that wrote the row.

CommitSha.description: Full 40-character commit SHA. May be empty for legacy rows.

Source.description: Provenance — same enum as the per-repo view.

IsDraft.description: Draft flag from the upstream metadata.

IsLatest.description: True for the latest release of THIS repo (uniqueness is per-repo, NOT per-array — multiple repos may each contribute one IsLatest=true row).

IsPreRelease.description: Pre-release flag from the upstream metadata.

CreatedAt.description: ISO-8601-ish timestamp; lexicographic sort matches chronological order.
